description: You are a UX Researcher auditing 'https://books.toscrape.com/' for form complexity. Your goal is to map the number of input fields on every page of the site to identify complex forms. Export the crawl results containing the input field counts to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/form_complexity.csv. Determine the maximum number of inputs found on any single page and record only that integer in ~/Documents/SEO/reports/max_inputs.txt.
